$comment: D-P5 Layer 1 document classification — Spaarke Insights Engine Phase 1. Realized via AiAnalysisNodeExecutor per Q5 audit (no new node executor). Runs unconditionally on every SPE upload (D-P7 ingest playbook, task 040). Output gates Layer 2 (D-P6) per D-59 cheap-gates-expensive economics: Layer 2 fires only when classification in {closing_letter, settlement_agreement, opinion_judgment} AND confidence >= 0.7. Output ALSO produces one Classification Observation per SPEC-phase-1-minimum.md §3.3 via Layer1ClassificationEmitter (task 030).
name: Layer 1 — Document Classification
$comment-model: Cheap model per D-59 Layer 1 economics: single typed-enum output runs on every SPE upload; gpt-4o-mini class is the cost-target. Layer 2 (the expensive call) only fires for outcome-bearing classifications, so Layer 1 is the gate that keeps universal ingest economical.
$comment-tokens: Layer 1 output is at most a 3-field JSON (classification enum + confidence number + one-sentence reasoning). 200 tokens is generous for the response; cap is tight to fail-fast on runaway generations.

knowledgeRetrieval.$comment-mode: Never per task 030 acceptance: classification is a self-contained decision over the document content alone — no reference rubric, no similar documents, no parent-entity metadata. All three retrieval tiers (L1 RagIndex, L2 customer documents, L3 records-index entity) are off. Keeps the per-upload latency + cost minimal.

outputSchema.$comment-retry: One retry on schema-validation failure (matches IOpenAiClient.GetStructuredCompletionAsync constrained-decoding semantics). The 8-value enum + numeric confidence + non-empty reasoning shape is small enough that constrained decoding should succeed first-try; the retry exists for the rare model deviation.

downstreamGates.$comment: Single emission step (NOT the per-field ObservationEmitter from D-P10 — Layer 1 produces exactly one Observation per document, not one-per-field). Subject = the source document; predicate = 'classification'; value = the enum; confidence = as returned; evidence = the source document ref; producedBy.Id = 'playbook://classification@v1', version = 'v1'.

downstreamGating.$comment-gates-layer2: Per SPEC-phase-1-minimum.md §3.3 + D-59: this node's output gates Layer 2 invocation. Layer 2 fires only when classification in {closing_letter, settlement_agreement, opinion_judgment} AND confidence >= 0.7. Other classifications (decision_memo, deal_document, pleading, correspondence, other) skip Layer 2 entirely. The conditional is owned by the D-P7 ingest playbook (task 040), not by this node config; documented here as the contract this node fulfills.

inputSanitization.$comment: Document content MUST pass through ISanitizer (D-A25) before reaching this node. Sanitization is wired at the SpeContentRetrieve stage in the D-P7 ingest playbook (task 040), upstream of this node. Per task 030 acceptance, sanitization wiring is documented here but enforced in task 040 — task 030 ships the config + prompt + emitter and the integration test confirms producedBy propagation.
